Julia Fractals Instructions: develops fractal images based on the iteration of the X -> X^2 + C

Julia Fractal.Pic1: TO START, ENTER A COMPLEX NUMBER, FIRST ITS REAL PART AND THEN ITS IMAGINARY    PART, BOTH OF WHICH SHOULD LIE BETWEEN  -2 AND +2.  AVOID ZERO, SINCE IT WILL   PRODUCE A 'DIVISION BY ZERO' ERROR.
